practice.hintPractice: Click the text and start typing — the lit key shows the next character
practice.hintPlain: Click the text and start typing to begin

settings.title: Settings
settings.fontHint: Applies to the typing box only, not the rest of the interface.
settings.fontPreview: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
settings.layoutHint: Changes the on-screen keyboard and finger guides.
settings.uiLanguageHint: Typing tests always stay in English.
settings.codeLanguageHint: Used by the Code typing mode.
settings.accountGuest: You're not signed in. Preferences are saved on this device.
settings.accountSynced: Signed in — preferences sync to your profile.
settings.usernameHint: Shown on the leaderboard and to rivals.
settings.usernameInvalid: That username isn't allowed — try another.
settings.usernameLocked: You can change your username again on {{date}}.

usernameGate.title: Choose a username
usernameGate.body: Pick a username to continue — it's shown on the leaderboard and to rivals. You can change it later (once a week).

profile.title: Profile
profile.signInPrompt: Sign in to see your stats, history, and personal bests.

help.title: How it works
help.intro: FluentKeys is a typing trainer. Take a timed test, see your words-per-minute and accuracy, and watch the on-screen keyboard light up the next key as you go.
help.weighting: Words are chosen from static lists — no AI. The selector biases toward the keys you miss most, so practice keeps targeting your weak spots.
help.layout: Pick your physical keyboard layout and a test font in Settings. The finger-colour guides follow the layout you choose.
help.account: Sign in to save results, track personal bests, and climb the leaderboard. You can practise without an account too.
